# Honeywell Hydraulics

> Industrial hydraulic cylinders, power packs, and custom fluid power systems manufactured in India.

## About Us
Honeywell Hydraulics is an ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer of heavy-duty hydraulic solutions. Based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, we engineer and produce reliable hydraulic equipment for continuous industrial operations, serving over 25 industries globally.

## Core Products
- **Hydraulic Cylinders:** Single acting, double acting, telescopic, and tie-rod cylinders. Bore sizes up to 300mm.
- **Hydraulic Power Packs:** Custom multi-station and hand-lever power units for precise fluid control.
- **Hydraulic Manifold Blocks:** Custom-machined blocks for space-efficient hydraulic circuits.
- **Custom Hydraulic Systems:** Complete turnkey fluid power solutions from engineering to commissioning.

## Trust & Quality
- **Certification:** ISO 9001:2015
- **Track Record:** 500+ projects completed, 5,000+ cylinders delivered.
- **Quality Control:** 100% of units are hydrostatic pressure tested at 1.5x operating pressure before dispatch.

## Links & Machine-Readable Files
- Main Website: https://honeywellhydraulics.com
- Product Catalog Data (Markdown): https://honeywellhydraulics.com/catalog.md

## Contact
- Location: Kathwada GIDC, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- For quotes and custom engineering, visit our website's contact section.
